title.en: Invocation for when you find something becoming difficult for you

items.arabicText: ((اللَّهُمَّ لاَ سَهْلَ إِلاَّ مَا جَعَلْتَهُ سَهْلاً، وَأَنْتَ تَجْعَلُ الْحَزْنَ إِذَا شِئْتَ سَهْلاً)).

translations.en: (O Allah, there is no ease except in that which You have made easy, and You make the difficulty, if You wish, easy.)
